message:
feat(core): add Bayesian hitch-risk posterior model and evidence ledger (ft-2p9cb.4.1.1)

EvidenceSignal, HitchRiskLevel, HitchRiskModel with log-odds posterior,
evidence decay, risk classification, HitchRiskDegradation detection,
and 19 unit tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
